description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:0.26 Docker image. Define a pages job that runs the command hugo, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch (only runs on master). Add a test job that also runs hugo but is excluded from the master branch (except master). Both jobs use the default test stage, with the pages job implicitly treated as a deploy stage for GitLab Pages.
